Bash(git commit -m "$(cat <<''EOF''
feat: Add GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) mode

Add new generation mode for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, Google SGE):
- New GenerationMode type (''seo'' | ''geo'') in types.ts
- GEO-specific prompt template with structured output rules
- UI toggle in SettingsForm with visual mode selection
- Conditional prompt/system message based on selected mode

GEO mode generates content with:
- Dictionary-style definitions for AI snippets
- Markdown tables for comparisons
- FAQ and Key Takeaways sections
- Data-driven language instead of marketing fluff

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)")
